non_character_assets.summary: 16 prop objects, 16 status/UI objects, and 16 square top-down terrain tiles.

ui_assets.summary: 16 selection markers, 7 UI frames, 4 button skins, 3 state accents, and 1 review-only rejected camp-card candidate.

warbase_assets.summary: 1 warbase sunset dashboard background, 16 wartable/warbase props, 16 warbase terrain tiles, and 1 wartable command dock frame.

quality_notes: stale east, north-east, and west were regenerated with feet-planted prompt after walking motion was detected.
falling-back-death is deprecated and intentionally not mapped in manifest.
error remains south-only until a future direction expansion pass.
